rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §251.008 governs political club meeting expense exclusions. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and neither references the other.
quote: Sec. 251.008. CERTAIN POLITICAL CLUB MEETINGS EXCLUDED.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and election code provision on political club meetings.
